diffs.diff:
--- a/explore.py
+++ b/explore.py
@@ -0,0 +1,64 @@
+import torch

+import torchmdnet

+print('torchmdnet version:', torchmdnet.__version__)

+print(dir(torchmdnet))

+

+import torchmdnet.models as models

+print('models:', dir(models))

+

+# Try to import specific models

+try:

+    from torchmdnet.models.torchmd_et import TorchMD_ET

+    print('TorchMD_ET ok')

+except Exception as e:

+    print('TorchMD_ET error:', e)

+

+try:

+    from torchmdnet.models.torchmd_gn import TorchMD_GN

+    print('TorchMD_GN ok')

+except Exception as e:

+    print('TorchMD_GN error:', e)

+

+try:

+    from torchmdnet.models.painn import PaiNN

+    print('PaiNN ok')

+except Exception as e:

+    print('PaiNN error:', e)

+

+try:

+    from torchmdnet.models.tensornet import TensorNet

+    print('TensorNet ok')

+except Exception as e:

+    print('TensorNet error:', e)

+

+try:

+    from torchmdnet.models.model import create_model

+    print('create_model ok')

+except Exception as e:

+    print('create_model error:', e)

+

+try:

+    from torchmdnet import models as m2

+    print('models attrs:', [x for x in dir(m2) if not x.startswith('_')])

+except Exception as e:

+    print('models error:', e)

+

+# Check if we can use SchNet from torchmdnet

+try:

+    from torchmdnet.models.schnet import SchNet

+    print('SchNet ok')

+except Exception as e:

+    print('SchNet error:', e)

+

+# Check output module

+try:

+    from torchmdnet.models.output_network import Scalar

+    print('Scalar output ok')

+except Exception as e:

+    print('Scalar error:', e)

+

+try:

+    from torchmdnet.models.output_network import EquivariantScalar

+    print('EquivariantScalar ok')

+except Exception as e:

+    print('EquivariantScalar error:', e)
